hhasset__operator_household_balance_shee.name: Total operator household assets
hhasset__operator_household_balance_shee.description: The estimated market value of household assets reported by the farm operator including cash, checking, CD's, Money Market accounts, IRA, 401K, Keogh and other retirement accounts, corporate stock, mutual funds, value of the operator's dwelling if not owned by the farm, real estate, business not part of the farm, and household vehicles.

fasst__operator_household_balance_sheet.name: Total operator household assets: Farm
fasst__operator_household_balance_sheet.description: Farm operator household's share of total farm business assets. Total assets represents the survey respondents' estimated market value on December 31 of all capital assets owned by the farm operation. For operations where the operator dwelling is considered part of the farm and located on the farm, the value of the dwelling is included.

nfasst__operator_household_balance_sheet.name: Total operator household assets: Non-farm
nfasst__operator_household_balance_sheet.description: Estimated market value of farm operator's household assets on December 31.

hhdebt__operator_household_balance_sheet.name: Total operator household debt
hhdebt__operator_household_balance_sheet.description: The amount of household debt on December 31, including mortgages on the dwelling if not owned by the farm, mortgages on other real estate, loans on businesses not part of the farm, and personal loans and credit cards.

fdebt__operator_household_balance_sheet.name: Total operator household debt: Farm
fdebt__operator_household_balance_sheet.description: Farm operator household's share of total farm liabilities. Total liabilities are composed of any monetary obligations of the farm operation on December 31. The amount reported includes principal due and any unpaid interest.  Debts for nonfarm purposes, even if farm or ranch asset are used as collateral, are excluded.

nfdebt__operator_household_balance_sheet.name: Total operator household debt: Non-Farm
nfdebt__operator_household_balance_sheet.description: Amount of debt obligations of the farm operator household on December 31.

hhnw__operator_household_balance_sheet.name: Total Operator household net worth
hhnw__operator_household_balance_sheet.description: Total farm household assets minus total farm household debt.  Farm household wealth is derived from a variety of sources. It ranges from physical assets of both the business and household to various types of financial assets, all differing in degree of liquidity, capital certainty, and visibility.

fnw__operator_household_balance_sheet.name: Total operator household net worth: Farm
fnw__operator_household_balance_sheet.description: The farm operator's household share of farm business net worth (farm business assets minus farm business liabilities).

nfnw__operator_household_balance_sheet.name: Total operator household net worth: Non-farm
nfnw__operator_household_balance_sheet.description: Calculated as non-farm assets of the farm operator household minus non-farm debt.
